name: Max SBI Card PRIME

international: Priority Pass standard membership is complimentary; post the 4 complimentary international lounge visits per year, visit charges apply at the programme's prevailing rate.

milestones.label: 6,000 bonus Reward Points on annual spends of Rs 40,000 across Landmark Stores
12,000 bonus Reward Points on annual spends of Rs 1 lakh across Landmark Stores
20,000 bonus Reward Points on annual spends of Rs 1.8 lakh across Landmark Stores
20,000 bonus Reward Points on overall annual retail spends of Rs 5 lakh

joiningBenefits: 12,000 bonus Reward Points worth Rs 3,000 on payment of annual fee
Reward Points are credited within 30 days of annual fee payment
renewalBenefits: 12,000 Reward Points worth Rs 3,000 on payment of renewal fee
Reward Points are credited within 30 days of renewal fee payment
additionalBenefits: Reward Points can be redeemed instantly at Lifestyle, Home Centre, Spar, and Max stores
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions from Rs 500 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle

redemption.ecosystemLabel: Lifestyle, Home Centre, Spar, and Max stores

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-01

W.e.f. 1 Sep 2025, reward accrual on digital gaming platforms/merchants and government related transactions is discontinued for Max SBI Card PRIME.
